pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target to Java 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 bytecode, which may not be compatible with Java 17 runtime features or may fail if the build environment enforces JDK 17 as the baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly handle the `release` flag for Java 17 or may have bugs with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version that supports Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok (like 1.18.16) may have compatibility issues with Java 17's stricter module system or internal API access restrictions, leading to annotation processing failures.
